div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Switzerland (Wilson), at Geneva
div.p: 111. Your 194, June 1, 10 a.m. Colonel Arthur W. Brown, Judge Advocate General’s Department, will report in Washington tomorrow. He will be made available immediately for duty on League Commission. Department presumes he will be appointed by the League as was General McCoy.

Colombian Minister today advised that Spanish member of Commission will arrive at Puerto Colombia June 15, and was anxious that American member arrive on the same date. As soon as Brown is appointed by the League wire at once full particulars regarding their desires for his movements.
